segments.name: noise-ds-logo-mark
segments.notes: rounded-square glyph of the Nintendo DS wordmark

segments.name: noise-kobold-canvas-logo
segments.notes: ripper's banner art

segments.name: screens-health-safety
segments.notes: 6 H&S warning screens in 6 languages; real BIOS panels but out of scope for picto-ds

segments.name: palette-text-strip
segments.notes: tiny 4-swatch text palette

segments.name: group-system-menu-composite
segments.split: contains: interface palette column, clock panel, calendar grid, two large menu grid screens, pink top/bottom bars, 3 DS Download Play buttons, 2 PICTOCHAT logo lockups, GBA/DS-card slot labels
segments.notes: largest composite; split by alpha at gap=1 within region, then hand-name

segments.name: palette-interface-grid
segments.notes: was palette-interface-grid; contains several sprites per Rob
segments.split: multiple elements inside (Rob's review); re-segment at gap=0 and re-catalog

segments.name: frame-corner-brackets
segments.split: 4x4 grid of corner-bracket selection frames, one per UI color

segments.name: panel-gba-slot-dark
segments.notes: black panel with orange border (GBA slot screen)

segments.name: group-menu-screens
segments.split: menu grid screens + pink header/footer bars + brightness/alarm setting rows

segments.name: dialog-color-picker
segments.notes: window with header and magenta swatch

segments.name: tabs-room-column-a
segments.split: vertical stack of 4 room tabs (A-D), state variant 1 of 3

segments.name: tabs-room-column-b
segments.split: vertical stack of 4 room tabs (A-D), state variant 2 of 3

segments.name: tabs-room-column-c
segments.split: vertical stack of 4 room tabs (A-D), state variant 3 of 3

segments.name: nametag-bar-a
segments.notes: 160x32 nametag bar with person icon, variant 1 of 3 (states TBD at extraction)

segments.name: frames-dashed-set
segments.notes: was frame-selection-dashed (single); contains several per Rob
segments.split: 3x3 grid of 33x33 dashed selection frames, one color variant each (incl. rainbow)

segments.name: panel-download-play-entry
segments.split: entry panel with input + person button, plus user-slot dot icons and black user tiles below
segments.notes: contains the input-field elements (ds.css input counterpart) + user slots; Rob's review

segments.name: sidebar-tool-strip
segments.split: 36x192 vertical strip left of touch screen; contains tool icons and scroll edges

segments.name: screen-touch-striped-bg
segments.notes: 256x192 striped touch-screen background — exact DS resolution

segments.name: group-console-art-and-bars
segments.split: DS console illustration (noise) + GAME BOY logo (noise) + pink gradient bars (keep) + connector lines (noise)

segments.name: group-keyboard-dark-composite
segments.split: dark symbol keyboard rows + orange key + pink/white entry bars + mini palette + white QWERTY keyboard with ENTER keys
segments.notes: keyboard, keys, input bars and other elements (ds.css inputs counterpart); Rob's review

segments.name: key-outline-drag
segments.notes: key outline states from the ripper's drag demo; useful for is-dragging style

segments.name: noise-annotation-stylus-drag
segments.notes: 3-line teal annotation about key drag behavior

segments.name: noise-label-white-a
segments.notes: white text label (verified: illegible white-on-transparent, ripper annotation)

segments.name: kbd-latin-basic
segments.split: numbers row + QWERTY letters + shift/caps/space; split into individual keys for the bitmap font

segments.name: group-pictochat-ui-composite
segments.split: PictoChat bottom-screen decomposition: message list panels, text input frame, SEND buttons (2 states), side toolbar icons, scroll arrows, copy buttons
segments.notes: PictoChat composer decomposition. Child a: top-screen bars (PICTOCHAT logo lockup + 'Now entering' banner, filled + outline variants). Child c: full composer — tool sidebar, the lined drawing base panel (horizontal ruled stripes; recolors with the PictoChat UI palette per Rob + seg-043/047 evidence), SEND buttons in 2 states, scroll/copy buttons. Reference screenshot: assets/source/pictochat-ui-reference.png

segments.name: keys-caps-a-color-column
segments.split: CAPS + A key pair repeated in every UI color (~16 rows); source for key recoloring palette map
segments.notes: several things inside besides CAPS+A color rows; Rob's review

segments.name: icons-kbd-mode-column
segments.split: 5 stacked 16x16 keyboard-mode tab icons (latin, accents, kana, symbols, emoticon)
segments.notes: verified via crop

segments.name: kbd-latin-main
segments.split: main PictoChat keyboard layout; split into keys via keymap in Phase 4
segments.notes: THE default keyboard; Rob's review

segments.name: letters-acbd-boxes
segments.split: A/C/B/D boxed letters, blue + yellow variants (room letter icons)

segments.name: group-kbd-palette-chrome
segments.split: keyboard chrome pieces that recolor when the PictoChat UI palette changes + palette strips; strip embedded labels
segments.notes: pairs with seg-043 (CAPS+A color rows) to derive the full recolor map; Rob's review

segments.name: nametags-pictochat-pills
segments.split: 2 pink nametag pill shapes + corner size marker; strip embedded 'Pictochat Nametag' label (noise)
segments.notes: verified via crop

segments.name: kbd-accents
segments.split: vowel keys with accent/tilde variants; keymap in Phase 4
segments.notes: Rob's review

segments.name: kbd-special-chars
segments.split: special character keys; keymap in Phase 4
segments.notes: Rob's review

segments.name: kbd-symbols-large
segments.split: 227x147 extended symbols layout

segments.name: nametag-maxlength-demo
segments.split: pink nametag pill at max length + marker; strip embedded 'Max nametag length' label (noise)
segments.notes: verified via crop

segments.name: kbd-kana
segments.split: Japanese kana layout; keymap in Phase 4
segments.notes: Rob's review

segments.name: kbd-symbols-ds
segments.split: DS-specific symbol keys (system glyphs); keymap in Phase 4
segments.notes: Rob's review

segments.name: noise-label-white-b
segments.notes: white text label (verified: illegible white-on-transparent, ripper annotation)

segments.name: group-icon-state-rows
segments.split: menu icon set (~17 icons) in 5 state rows: normal, selected, selected-then-dragged-off, this-category-selected, other-category-selected; plus green status bar. Prime stamp source
segments.notes: DS menu icon set; confirmed by Rob
